title: The future of software engineering, tokenmaxxing and AI in higher education
summary: A Mixture of Experts podcast episode discusses how software engineering is changing with AI, the trend of tokenmaxxing as companies exceed AI budgets, NVIDIA's RTX Spark bringing large models to consumer PCs, and universities grappling with AI literacy requirements for students entering transformed workplaces.
